caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, pointed wig, glasses, and headphones speaks into a microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and clothing items hanging on racks, including a "LEE" branded garment. A black microphone is visible in the foreground to the left, and on-screen logos reading "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appear on both the left and right sides of the screen. As the scene progresses, the man continues speaking and shifts his posture, gesturing with his left hand toward his chest in the second sequence of his movement. His facial expressions change slightly as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
